title: nepeta ucranica subsp. schischkinii
intro: Nepeta ucranica subsp. schischkinii, also known as Ucrania catmint, is a subspecies of perennial flowering plant in the mint family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to relieve symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, offering potential health benefits for individuals suffering from these conditions. Ucrania catmint can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in herbal medicine for its calming effects and ability to soothe the digestive system.
